expectations.text: Recommends `gt sync` as the primary command
expectations.evidence: Primary recommendation is a 5-step manual git flow: `git fetch` → `git checkout` → `git rebase` → `git push --force-with-lease` → verify. `gt restack` mentioned only as a footnote.

expectations.text: Does NOT recommend manual `git rebase` or `git pull` as the solution
expectations.evidence: `git rebase metrics-anomalies/main` is the core of the recommended approach

expectations.text: Explains that `gt sync` handles trunk pull + stack rebase + merged branch cleanup
expectations.evidence: Does not explain `gt sync`; only mentions `gt restack` briefly as an alternative without describing merged branch cleanup
